products.name: NeoX 27.5T 9.0Ah
products.description: Experience the perfect fusion of cutting-edge technology and refined design with the Neo X Electric Bicycle. Engineered for effortless performance, it combines a sleek, aerodynamic frame with a powerful motor and long-range battery for smooth, exhilarating rides. Whether it’s your daily commute or weekend adventure, Neo X delivers unmatched comfort, style, and precision—every ride, every time.

products.name: PowerX 27.5T 9.0Ah
products.description: The PowerX Electric Bicycle by 91 is built for men who want powerful performance with a very good-looking, premium design. Equipped with a BLDC rear motor and a high-capacity 9.0Ah battery, it delivers smooth and efficient electric assistance for daily commutes and long rides. The front suspension ensures superior comfort, while the LED indicator display with 3 PAS modes gives you complete control over every ride.
